description: Lecture discussing the complexities of multi-unit auctions, focusing on downward sloping valuations and the VCG mechanism for surplus maximization.
topic_summary: In this lecture, the speaker explores scenario four of mechanism design, emphasizing multi-unit auctions and the implications of downward sloping valuations [t=137.66]. The discussion includes the structure of the VCG mechanism and its polynomial time solution for surplus maximization [t=268.34].
